title: pogostemon nudus
intro: Pogostemon nudus, also known as Japanese mint or Japanese basil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pogostemon nudus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and calm the mind. Herbal preparations of Pogostemon nudus include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create teas, creams, and other topical applications.
